prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic 35mm portrait photograph from an extreme overhead, drone-like viewpoint looking down the center of a wide moving escalator inside a futuristic luxury shopping mall. A single adult man stands completely still on the escalator, centered in the frame and facing upward toward the camera, with calm, motionless body language. He has short dark hair and wears a dark brown wool overcoat over a beige sweater, dark trousers, and polished dark leather shoes. The escalator steps form strong symmetrical leading lines, with glass side rails and metallic grooves, descending into a bright open mall atrium. Around him, show hundreds of shoppers on adjacent escalators and the mall floor rendered with heavy motion blur, creating a dramatic contrast between the sharp still subject and the rushing crowd. The mall should feel upscale and futuristic, with pale stone floors, glass storefronts, warm wood balcony curves, glossy black shop entrances, soft retail lighting, and a spacious multi-level interior. Use shallow depth of field focused on the subject, cinematic color grading, realistic lens perspective, subtle wide-angle distortion from above, natural indoor lighting, high detail, documentary fashion editorial mood, no readable text, no logos, no watermark.
